[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands) 3. [Outdoor Banner Stands](https://www.banners.com/banner-stands/outdoor) 4. Replacement Banner - Outdoor Stands # Replacement Vinyl Banners for Outdoor Banner Stands ### Design Custom Vinyl Banner Replacements for your Outdoor Banner Stand Online! Get started below: Do you need to update the content on your Outdoor Banner Stand? Get started on your replacement Vinyl for your Outdoor Banner Stand below. You can customize it for any occasion or location. We have lots of templates available for you use. You can edit the banner template in our online design by adding clip art, photos, text, and a background. Get started on your replacement by selecting a design option below: * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Replacement Material](#8ab8a5de-ba40-4345-b435-2f45682dc0e5) * [Artwork](#6384d776-b224-4c21-a377-90d0d6d340fd) * [Order Process](#ba3da710-edff-4261-a757-922c1d6f5ca6) * [Shipping](#e90a1c7b-3de0-4f14-8c61-332f8506cbb7) * [Production Times](#b7ef8a8d-003e-4a85-a5f8-55c8a4e9b424) Step 1 - Choose Size and Quantity ## Choose Size Choose the size you want for your product Size (H x W): 33.0" x 24.0" 33.0" x 46.0" 33.0" x 94.0" 78.0" x 31.0" 120.0" x 42.0" Qty: Step 2 - Choose Add-Ons ## Choose Options Choose the options you want for your product ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Step 3 - Choose Design Method ## Pick a Template All Templates Automotive Stands Business Stands Business Stands Celebration Stands Church Stands Education Stands Fitness Stands Holiday Stands Misc. Stands Music Stands Political Stands Real Estate Stands Restaurant Stands Sales Stands Sports Stands Sportsman Stands Trade Show Stands Wedding Stands Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ ## About Replacement Material: Vinyl Replacements are printed on high quality 13oz scrim material. The scrim vinyl is a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength. [**Click here to request a sample packet of materials**](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) #### Vinyl Printing: Vinyl replacements are digitally printed in full color. You can select one of our banner templates to customize in the online designer with our backgrounds, clipart, and text. You can also upload your own images. #### Vinyl Sizes: Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5 ft banner could finish with a 2.5 inch variance). If your banner size needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. If you need a specific size print that is not listed as an option in the drop-down menu, please [request a quote](https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banner-quote) or contact a customer service representative. 1-866-419-SIGN or [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#7a091f080c13191f3a181b14141f080954191517) [Create Your Product](#cust) ## Artwork #### Artwork Guidelines The file that prints best is .eps c
